# Elite Redux — Community Challenge System: Implementation Plan

> Status: design + implementation blueprint, ready for `docs/plans/`. Every file:line below was grounded against the real tree at `C:\Users\Hafida\pokerogue\.worktrees\elite-redux`. The screen is built by combining the **Colosseum dark/gold board** (`src/ui/handlers/colosseum-ui-handler.ts`) with the **World-Map parchment kit** (`src/ui/handlers/er-map-ui-handler.ts`), backed by new `/community/*` routes on the existing `er-save-api` worker, and verified through the golden-image render harness (`test/tools/render-ui-page.test.ts`).

---

## 1. Overview + Goal

### 1.1 What we are building
A **Community Challenges** screen and end-to-end system that lets trainers browse, play, bookmark, and author custom challenge runs created by other players. The screen matches the supplied concept art (dark, gritty dark-fantasy / ancient-map look: distressed near-black background, gold/bronze chrome, glowing purple + cyan highlights, painterly per-challenge card art) **as closely as ER's 2D Phaser/`@napi-rs` UI allows**.

Visual scope per the concept art:
- Left vertical nav sidebar (COMMUNITY / FEATURED / BROWSE / MY CHALLENGES / CREATE NEW / BOOKMARKS / HISTORY + player avatar crest).
- Top bar (eyebrow + distressed "CHALLENGES" title + subtitle + TRENDING dropdown + paging + VIEW ALL).
- Featured row of 4 painterly card "plates".
- Detail panel (crest, title, author/first-clear, stats, bookmark, description, tag chips, RULES / ALLOWED POKEMON grid / RESTRICTIONS).
- Community-stats panel (donut chart + recent completions + VIEW LEADERBOARD).
- Bottom button-hint bar.

### 1.2 The two hard constraints (both confirmed)
1. **No bespoke per-challenge AI art.** The large card "ART IMAGES" must be produced **deterministically** from assets ER already ships (Pokémon sprites/icons, shiny / black-shiny variants on the er-assets CDN, type/biome theming, frames, gradients, emblems). See §3.
2. **Zero challenges at launch.** Featured/community lists are empty on day one, so **every empty/placeholder state is a first-class design target**, not an afterthought — and is produced by the *same* renderer as the populated state (hero layer off). See §3.4 and §2.

### 1.3 The aesthetic is a hybrid of two existing ER themes (be honest up front)
- **World-Map redesign** (`er-map-ui-handler.ts`): ancient-map textures, compass rose, leather frame, corner ticks. Its base is **light aged paper** (`PARCH_BASE = 0xe2d2ab`, `er-map-ui-handler.ts:45`), not dark.
- **Colosseum board** (`colosseum-ui-handler.ts`): **deep near-black board** (`BOARD = 0x0b1838`, `colosseum-ui-handler.ts:65`), gold PWT 9-slice chrome, gold crest/trophy emblems, cyan accent (`NEXT = 0x48c8f8`, `:63`), trainer-portrait treatment.

The concept art is **structurally the Colosseum board, skinned with the World-Map parchment textures as gold-on-dark accents.** That is the correct mental model, and ~85% of the screen already exists as code + CDN assets + harness-proven patterns. The three real gaps are called out in §2.4.

### 1.4 The single source-of-truth artifact: `CommunityChallengeConfig`
Decide this shape once; it is the verification source of truth (§4.3) **and** the input to `deriveBanner()` card art (§3.3) **and** the create-flow output (§5). It serializes 1:1 to the run's persisted `{gameModeId, challenges: ChallengeData[], erDifficulty, seed, allowedSpecies}` (`src/system/save-data.ts`, `src/system/game-data.ts:1299-1346`), which is exactly what config-match compares.

```ts
type CommunityChallengeConfig = {
  schemaVersion: number;
  id: string; name: string; subtitle: string; description: string;
  author: string; authorId: number; createdAt: number;
  gameModeId: GameModes;                          // CHALLENGE | COOP
  difficulty: ErDifficulty;                       // "youngster"|"ace"|"elite"|"hell"
  difficultyTier: 1|2|3|4|5;                       // self-rated bin (drives art, filter)
  seed?: string;                                  // present = fixed-seed challenge
  baseChallenges: [Challenges, number, number?][]; // REUSE Challenges enum [id,value,severity?]
  allowedSpecies: number[] | null;                // root speciesIds; null = all (NEW filter)
  restrictions: { noLegendary; noMythical; noUltraBeasts; noRepeats; starterNotGuaranteed };
  targetWave: number;                             // a clear must reach this (<= 200)
  tags: string[];                                 // chips: NUZLOCKE / RANDOMIZER / HARDCORE
  art:    { themeSpeciesId?; variant: 0|1|"black"; accentType?; biomeId?; emblem? };  // recipe, NOT bytes
  emblem?: object;                                 // crest/difficulty-emblem recipe
  economy?: { goldMult?; xpMult?; trainerFreq?; shopFreq?; startLevel?; startMoney?; meRate?; levelCapPerGym? };
  constraints?: { itemBans?: ModifierId[]; moveBans?: MoveId[]; abilityBans?: AbilityId[] };
};
```

---

## 2. UI Blueprint (per-region)

The screen is implemented as **two new `UiHandler` classes** that follow the ErShinyLab structural discipline (`src/ui/handlers/er-shiny-lab-ui-handler.ts`) and reuse the ErMap/Colosseum theme kit.

### 2.0 Registration, handler, entry point

**New `UiMode`s (append-only — ordinal must match array position).** `src/enums/ui-mode.ts:68` is currently the last entry (`ER_SHINY_LAB = 68`, confirmed `:67-69`). Append:
```ts
  /** ER Community Challenges: browse/play community-authored challenge runs. */
  COMMUNITY_CHALLENGES,        // = 69
  /** ER Community Challenges: the create-a-challenge designer. */
  COMMUNITY_CHALLENGE_CREATE,  // = 70
```
`UI.getHandler()` does `this.handlers[this.mode]`, so the enum ordinal is **positional** against the `this.handlers` array in `src/ui/ui.ts`. Append `new CommunityChallengesUiHandler()` then `new CommunityChallengeCreateUiHandler()` to that array in the **same order**, import both at the top of `ui.ts`, and add both modes to the `transitionModes` fade list (where `CHALLENGE_SELECT` already lives) so the screen fades in like the other full-screen ER screens. `UI.setup()` calls `setup()` on each handler at boot.

Both classes `extends UiHandler` (`src/ui/handlers/ui-handler.ts:16`); ctor `super(UiMode.COMMUNITY_CHALLENGES)` / `super(UiMode.COMMUNITY_CHALLENGE_CREATE)`. New files:
- `src/ui/handlers/community-challenges-ui-handler.ts` (browse/featured/detail)
- `src/ui/handlers/community-challenge-create-ui-handler.ts` (designer)
- `src/ui/community-challenge-card.ts` (the card-art compositor, §3)

**Entry point — Challenge Mode submenu {Vanilla, Community}.** The "New Game → game-mode" menu is built in `src/phases/title-phase.ts:143-188`; the Challenge entry is `title-phase.ts:151-157` (`setModeAndEnd(GameModes.CHALLENGE)`), gated behind `gameData.isUnlocked(Unlockables.ENDLESS_MODE)` (`:150`), and the whole list is shown via `globalScene.ui.setOverlayMode(UiMode.OPTION_SELECT, { options })` (`:184-188`). Replace the single Challenge handler with a nested `OPTION_SELECT`:
```ts
options.push({
  label: GameMode.getModeName(GameModes.CHALLENGE),
  handler: () => {
    globalScene.ui.setOverlayMode(UiMode.OPTION_SELECT, { options: [
      { label: "Custom Challenge",       handler: () => { setModeAndEnd(GameModes.CHALLENGE); return true; } },
      { label: "Community Challenges",   handler: () => {
          globalScene.ui.setOverlayMode(UiMode.COMMUNITY_CHALLENGES, buildCommunityChallengesConfig());
          return true; } },
    ]});
    return true;
  },
});
```
- **Custom** keeps the existing path → `src/phases/select-challenge-phase.ts:12` → `UiMode.CHALLENGE_SELECT`.
- **Community** opens the new screen as `setOverlayMode` (chain mode; `revertMode()` pops back to the game-mode menu — same overlay pattern the World Map uses). The config object carries an `onPlay(challenge)` callback that resolves to `setModeAndEnd(GameModes.CHALLENGE)` seeded with the chosen challenge's rule set; the handler invokes it instead of `revertMode()` on confirm (the Shiny Lab `config.onExit` pattern in `er-shiny-lab-ui-handler.ts`).
- **Staging gate:** until the worker is deployed, gate the Community entry behind `import.meta.env.DEV || import.meta.env.VITE_DEV_TOOLS === "1"` (the dev-tools registry gate, `src/dev-tools/registry.ts`), and keep **CREATE** behind a feature flag until verified. The client degrades gracefully (empty feeds, local-only) when the worker is unreachable.

### 2.1 Global layout — full-screen container + named geometry

Copy the ErShinyLab full-screen convention: logical screen 320×180, container at `y = -h` so child (0,0) lands at screen top-left.
```ts
const w = globalScene.scaledCanvas.width;   // 320
const h = globalScene.scaledCanvas.height;  // 180
this.container = globalScene.add.container(0, -h);
this.container.setVisible(false);
ui.add(this.container);
this.container.add(globalScene.add.rectangle(0, 0, w, h, BG_BASE, 1).setOrigin(0)); // opaque dark board
```
Hoist all geometry to module-level consts (the ErShinyLab discipline):
```
SCREEN_W=320 SCREEN_H=180
SIDEBAR_X=0  SIDEBAR_W=44   // concept "~110px" → 44 logical px (×6 screen scale)
NAV_ROWS=7   NAV_ROW_H=18   NAV_Y0=22   AVATAR_Y=156
TOP_X=48 TOP_Y=4 TOP_H=30
CARD_X0=48 CARD_Y=38 CARD_W=63 CARD_H=52 CARD_STEP=66   // 4 featured cards
DETAIL_X=48 DETAIL_Y=94 DETAIL_W=168 DETAIL_H=78        // lower-left window
STATS_X=222 STATS_Y=94 STATS_W=92 STATS_H=78            // lower-right window
DONUT_CX=248 DONUT_CY=120 DONUT_R_OUT=20 DONUT_R_IN=12
HINT_Y=173
```
**Persistent vs transient:** build chrome + reusable row/card slots ONCE in `setup()`; per-data redraws go into `this.transient[]` and are `.destroy()`'d at the top of `refresh()` (the ErMap pattern). A single `render()` re-derives everything for the current focus/data (the ErShinyLab `render()` orchestration).

### 2.2 Theme palette + helpers (the one canonical palette)

Unified from the World-Map parchment accents + Colosseum dark board. **Purple is the only genuinely new accent** (no existing equivalent). All source values verified:

```ts
// --- Surface (dark map board) ---
const BG_BASE    = 0x0b1838; // colosseum-ui-handler.ts:65  (deep near-black navy board)
const BG_SCRIM   = 0x140d06; // er-map-ui-handler.ts:247    (modal scrim @0.62)
const PANEL_FILL = 0x101a30; // windowed sub-panels (lifted from BG_BASE)
const CARTOUCHE  = 0x1a2440; // inset list boxes (dark analog of er-map 0xd7c48d)
// --- Gold / bronze chrome ---
const GOLD       = 0xf8d030; // colosseum-ui-handler.ts:62  (primary chrome + selected border)
const GOLD_DEEP  = 0xb8860b; // bronze shade for frame depth
const FRAME_DARK = 0x4a3217; // er-map-ui-handler.ts:46     (leather border)
const FRAME_MID  = 0x6e4d28; // er-map-ui-handler.ts:47     (inner rule / tile frames)
// --- Accents / status ---
const ACTIVE_RED = 0xb23320; // er-map-ui-handler.ts:51     (FEATURED active border / red-orange glow)
const CYAN       = 0x48c8f8; // colosseum-ui-handler.ts:63  (info / IN PROGRESS)
const PURPLE     = 0x8a4fff; // NEW accent — no existing equivalent
const GREEN_CLEAR= 0x6cc24a; // brighten of er-map GREEN 0x4a7a2a (:55) for the donut CLEARED slice
const RED_FAIL   = 0xb23320; // = ACTIVE_RED  (donut FAILED slice)
// --- Text fills (set as FILL, never setTint — see erInkText) ---
const TEXT_INK   = "#e8ecf8"; const TEXT_DIM = "#90a0c0"; const TEXT_GOLD = "#f8d030";
```

Helpers reused **verbatim** (do not reinvent):
- **`erInkText(x,y,content,color,fontSize,align)`** (`er-map-ui-handler.ts:165-176`) — `addTextObject(..., TextStyle.WINDOW, {fontSize,align,color})` then `setShadow(0,0,"rgba(0,0,0,0)")` to kill the doubled-glyph WINDOW shadow. Sets color as the text **FILL**, never `setTint` (the comment at `:164-165` documents that `setTint` darkens the window drop-shadow and doubles every glyph). Use for ALL labels.
- **`drawErCompass(g,cx,cy,r,color,alpha)`** (`er-map-ui-handler.ts:78-115`) — 8-point compass-rose watermark (`fillTriangle` + two `strokeCircle` rings) behind cards/panels at low alpha (gold, ~0.1) for the ancient-map read.
- **`drawErParchment` recipe** (`er-map-ui-handler.ts:119-160`) — `fillRect` base → highlight/worn gradient bands → vignette `strokeRect` → compass watermark → 4px leather frame `strokeRect` (`:132`) → 1px inner rule → corner ticks via `lineBetween` (`:140-151`) → inset cartouche. Recolor to gold-on-dark for panel chrome.
- **`pwtPanel(x,y,w,h,button?)`** (`colosseum-ui-handler.ts:71-79`) — gold/navy 9-slice (`er_pwt_panel` / `er_pwt_button`, loaded `src/loading-scene.ts:113-116`) with graceful `addWindow` fallback. Primary panel chrome.
- **`addWindow(x,y,w,h,…,WindowVariant)`** (`src/ui/ui-theme.ts`, borderSize 8) — `WindowVariant.THIN/XTHIN` for chips/sub-boxes. Tint with `.setTint(PANEL_FILL)`.
- **Crests / emblems already on CDN:** `er_pwt_crest` (gold crest, `loading-scene.ts:108`) and `er_pwt_trophy` (`:112`) are directly usable as circular crest/emblem art.
- **Fonts:** body/labels → `"emerald"` (pokemon-bw.ttf, `src/ui/text.ts:95`) via `TextStyle.WINDOW`; big titles/values → `"pkmnems"` (pokemon-emerald-pro.ttf, `src/i18n.ts:41`) at large size with `TEXT_GOLD` fill, exactly like the Colosseum wordmark (`colosseum-ui-handler.ts:165-168`). **No brush-stroke font exists** — see §2.4.

### 2.3 Per-region specification

#### LEFT SIDEBAR (nav rail)
Child `Container` at `(SIDEBAR_X, 0)`. Background = `pwtPanel(0,0,SIDEBAR_W,SCREEN_H)` tinted darker + a 1px gold `strokeRect` right edge.

- **7 nav rows** (COMMUNITY / FEATURED / BROWSE / MY CHALLENGES / CREATE NEW / BOOKMARKS / HISTORY), built once as reusable slots: each = `sprite(x,y,iconKey)` + `erInkText` label at `y = NAV_Y0 + i*NAV_ROW_H`.
  - **Icons from existing atlases** (no new art): compass crest → `er_pwt_crest` scaled; star / magnifier / gear / plus / bookmark / clock → the `items` / `types` / UI atlases or elemental-gem sprites; fall back to a `drawErCompass`/Graphics glyph when a key is missing (the ErMap missing-texture fallback). A dedicated `er_icon__ui_*` set on the CDN is the clean long-term option but launch reuses existing glyphs.
  - **Active row** (FEATURED shown active) = a `rectangle` highlight behind the row with `setStrokeStyle(2, ACTIVE_RED)` + a faux-bloom second `strokeRect` at +1px / lower alpha (the "red-orange glowing border"). Reposition this one rectangle on cursor move (the ErShinyLab tab-underline reuse).
  - **Player avatar crest (bottom):** `colosseumHeadSprite(trainerKey, displayH)` (`colosseum-ui-handler.ts:89-107`) inside a hex frame = a `Phaser.GameObjects.Polygon` (6 points) stroked GOLD (Polygons render in the harness — proven by the egg-hatch IV hexagon, `src/ui/containers/stats-container.ts:28,49,53`). Label `erInkText` "RIVAL / Rank 42" (cosmetic stub for MVP; no backend).
- **Nav binding:** `navIndex` 0-6 → a `CCView` enum {COMMUNITY, FEATURED, BROWSE, MINE, CREATE, BOOKMARKS, HISTORY}. CREATE → `ui.setMode(UiMode.COMMUNITY_CHALLENGE_CREATE, …)`. Others swap the main-area content set.
- **Empty state:** rail is always static/populated; MINE / BOOKMARKS / HISTORY badges show count `0` and their content areas render the empty messages below.

#### TOP BAR
Container at `(TOP_X, TOP_Y)`, width `SCREEN_W - SIDEBAR_W`.
- Eyebrow `erInkText(TOP_X, TOP_Y, "COMMUNITY", TEXT_DIM, "20px")`.
- Title `addTextObject(TOP_X, TOP_Y+6, "CHALLENGES", TextStyle.WINDOW, {fontSize:"42px"}).setTint(GOLD)` — Colosseum-wordmark treatment (brush-stroke approximated; §2.4).
- Subtitle `erInkText(TOP_X, TOP_Y+22, "Take on unique runs created by trainers around the world.", TEXT_DIM, "16px")`.
- **TRENDING dropdown (top-right):** `pwtPanel(...,true)` raised button + `erInkText` label + `▼` glyph; opens an `OPTION_SELECT` overlay {Trending / Newest / Most Cleared / Hardest} → sets `sortKey`, re-`render()`.
- **Paging arrows `‹ ›`:** two `erInkText` glyphs; LEFT/RIGHT step the featured-window offset.
- **VIEW ALL button:** `pwtPanel(...,true)` + label → switches to BROWSE view.
- **Empty state:** dropdown shows "TRENDING" (disabled-dim); VIEW ALL dims; arrows hidden when `pageCount<=1`.

#### FEATURED CHALLENGES ROW (the 4 card "plates")
Section label `erInkText` "FEATURED CHALLENGES" + a crossed-swords glyph (an `items`/ribbon atlas frame, or two rotated `rectangle`s). 4 cards at `x = CARD_X0 + i*CARD_STEP`, `y=CARD_Y`, `CARD_W×CARD_H`. Each card is a child `Container` holding the **plate composite** (§3) + overlay text:
- Title `erInkText(...,"20px").setTint(GOLD)` + subtitle `erInkText(...,"14px",TEXT_DIM)` over a `BG_BASE`-fill foot bar.
- Bottom row: `erInkText` "CLEAR RATE 7.3%" + "ATTEMPTS 24,147" + a small circular type/difficulty emblem (§3.2).
- **Selected card** (cursor) = bright `GOLD` `strokeRect`; **FEATURED-active** card additionally gets the `ACTIVE_RED` faux-bloom halo.
- **Nav:** within FEATURED focus, LEFT/RIGHT move `cardCursor` 0-3 (wrap), and moving re-binds the DETAIL + STATS panels below to that challenge (the ErMap "cursor move re-lists one section" pattern, not a full rebuild). ACTION → DETAIL/PLAY (§2.5) or `onPlay`.
- **Data:** `featured: ChallengeSummary[]`.
- **Empty/launch state ("vacant standards"):** all 4 cards through the SAME plate pipeline with the hero layer OFF — dark tincture + `drawErCompass` watermark + a faint seed-of-the-day silhouette at ~15% alpha + foot-bar "NO CHALLENGE CLAIMED — Forge the first." One card carries the `+` CREATE accent pulsing `ACTIVE_RED`. No separate empty asset.

#### DETAIL PANEL (lower-left)
`pwtPanel(DETAIL_X, DETAIL_Y, DETAIL_W, DETAIL_H)` window, `drawErCompass` watermark behind. All sub-elements transient, rebuilt per selected challenge:
- **Circular crest (left):** the §3.2 emblem at ~32px (same emblem the card corner uses, rendered large): `er_pwt_crest` ring + 2-stop type-tincture `fillCircle` field + hero **icon** (`species.getIconAtlasKey()`/`getIconId()`, `src/data/pokemon-species.ts:582,598`) scaled to fit.
- **Title** `erInkText "NOZLOCKE: THE ULTIMATE TEST" GOLD "24px"`.
- **Author / first-clear:** two `colosseumHeadSprite(...)` mini avatars + `erInkText` "Created by UmbraKai" / "First Clear by Solaris".
- **Stats line:** `erInkText` "CLEAR RATE 7.3%" / "ATTEMPTS 24,147".
- **BOOKMARK (star) button:** `pwtPanel(...,true)` + star glyph; ACTION toggles bookmark, re-tints star GOLD↔dim.
- **Description paragraph:** `addTextObject(...,{wordWrap:{width: DETAIL_W*6 - pad}})`.
- **Tag chips** (NUZLOCKE / RANDOMIZER / HARDCORE): each `addWindow(...,WindowVariant.XTHIN)` or Graphics `fillRoundedRect` + `erInkText`, colored by tag.
- **Three sub-columns:**
  - **RULES** — icon + `erInkText` list ("Faint it, box it", "Randomized wild encounters", "Randomized abilities and moves", "No items in battle", "Set mode", "Level cap per gym").
  - **ALLOWED POKEMON** — a 3×3 **icon grid** (the BiomeShop grid math, `src/ui/handlers/biome-shop-ui-handler.ts:441-486`: `col=i%COLS, row=floor(i/COLS), x=GRID_X+col*STEP`). Each cell = `species.getIconId()` frame (ER-custom species resolve via `er_icon__<slug>`, `src/loading-scene.ts:745-754`). Last cell = a `+342 MORE` tile (Graphics rect + `erInkText`).
  - **RESTRICTIONS** — icon + `erInkText` list ("No Legendary Pokemon", "No Mythical Pokemon", "No Ultra Beasts", "No repeats", "Starter is not guaranteed").
- **Empty state:** crest rendered "unstamped" (gold ring + neutral-grey `fillCircle`, no charge); body = centered `erInkText` "Be the first to create a community challenge."; sub-columns hidden.

#### COMMUNITY STATS PANEL (lower-right) — donut + recent + leaderboard
`pwtPanel(STATS_X, STATS_Y, STATS_W, STATS_H)`.
- **Donut chart** (FEASIBLE, harness-renders): one `globalScene.add.graphics()`. Per segment `g.slice(DONUT_CX,DONUT_CY,DONUT_R_OUT,a0,a1,false).fillPath()` with CLEARED `GREEN_CLEAR` / IN PROGRESS `CYAN` / FAILED `RED_FAIL` (angles from 7.3 / 48.1 / 44.6 %), then `fillCircle(DONUT_CX,DONUT_CY,DONUT_R_IN,BG_BASE)` to punch the hole. Phaser Graphics `slice`/`arc` replays to the 2D context and `@napi-rs/canvas` implements `ctx.arc` fully (compass already proves `strokeCircle`/`fillCircle`, `er-map-ui-handler.ts:87-114`). **Geometry + segment colours are EXACT**; only soft glow is approximated.
- **Center label** `erInkText` "24.1K / ATTEMPTS".
- **Legend** — three `fillCircle` swatches + `erInkText` "CLEARED 7.3%" / "IN PROGRESS 48.1%" / "FAILED 44.6%".
- **Recent completions list** — reusable rows: `colosseumHeadSprite` mini avatar + `erInkText` name + "Xh ago" (Solaris 2h, Kitsune 5h, PokeMasterT 8h, LunaEcho 12h, BlazeRunner 1d).
- **VIEW LEADERBOARD button** — `pwtPanel(...,true)` + label; MVP: disabled/"coming soon"; P2 → leaderboard sub-screen.
- **Empty state:** donut = single full-circle flat grey (no segments), center "NO ATTEMPTS YET"; recent list = "Be the first to clear a challenge."; leaderboard dim.

#### BOTTOM BUTTON-HINT BAR
Single centered `erInkText` at `HINT_Y=173`, rebuilt per focus-region (the ErShinyLab `refreshHint()`). Text: `"A View Challenge   X Filters   Y Create Challenge   Sort   B Back"`. For real keybind glyphs, copy the device-aware `updateLeaveHint` (`biome-shop-ui-handler.ts:339-360`): `inputController.getIconForLatestInputRecorded(...)` → a `sprite(key,"X.png")` from the `keyboard`/gamepad atlas, refreshed each `show()`. Hardcoded letters are fine for v1.

### 2.4 Faithful vs Approximated in 2D

| Element | Verdict | Why |
|---|---|---|
| Dark board + gold/bronze 9-slice chrome | **FAITHFUL** | `pwtPanel`/`er_pwt_*` already on CDN + harness-proven (`patchNineSliceCanvas`) |
| Parchment / compass / leather / corner-tick chrome | **FAITHFUL** | pure Graphics, ErMap already renders |
| Hero silhouette identity (card layer 4) | **FAITHFUL (tolerance 0)** | `setTint(0x000000)` = ×0 multiply, exact under the harness's approximated offscreen-multiply |
| Donut geometry + segment colours | **FAITHFUL** | `g.slice`/`arc` render in `@napi-rs`; Polygon proven by IV hexagon |
| Pokémon icon grid + "+N MORE", emblems, ribbons, chips, avatars | **FAITHFUL** | existing icon/atlas frames + Graphics |
| Empty / "vacant standards" states | **FAITHFUL** | same renderer, hero off |
| Red-orange active border / faux-bloom | **APPROXIMATE** | stacked `strokeRect`s; true bloom is WebGL-only |
| Purple/cyan glow rim, type-colour rim copies, biome-bg tincture | **APPROXIMATE** | non-black multiplies are approximated; runtime aura `document`-gated OFF headless |
| Distressed near-black torn-map grit | **APPROXIMATE** | faked via vignette + compass unless the optional grain PNG (§3.5) is added |
| Painterly card art | **APPROXIMATE (central gap)** | framed black-silhouette-on-tincture composite, not truly painted; mitigated by focus→colour reveal + colour detail crest/grid |
| Brush-stroke distressed title font | **NOT-FEASIBLE from existing assets** | only pixel fonts (`text.ts:95`, `i18n.ts`); needs a new `.ttf/.otf` (§3.5) — v1 approximates with `pkmnems`/emerald at large GOLD fill |

### 2.5 Navigation state machine (no mouse)

A `focusRegion` enum {SIDEBAR, TOPBAR, CARDS, DETAIL, STATS}. `processInput(button)` (with the 250ms post-open debounce, the ErShinyLab pattern) routes by region:
- **SIDEBAR:** UP/DOWN move `navIndex` (wrap), RIGHT enters CARDS, ACTION activates the row (CREATE → `setMode(COMMUNITY_CHALLENGE_CREATE)`), CANCEL → `onExit`/`revertMode`.
- **CARDS:** LEFT/RIGHT move `cardCursor` (wrap; at edges page via TOP arrows), DOWN enters DETAIL, LEFT at index 0 returns to SIDEBAR, ACTION → DETAIL/PLAY, CANCEL → SIDEBAR.
- **DETAIL:** UP/DOWN scroll the rule/allowed sub-columns, ACTION on ALLOWED grid focuses the icon grid (BiomeShop grid nav, `biome-shop-ui-handler.ts:554-595`), CANCEL → CARDS.
- **STATS:** ACTION on VIEW LEADERBOARD, CANCEL → CARDS.
- Every move: `playSelect()` + a targeted re-render (the ErShinyLab `afterEffectMove`).

**Per-challenge DETAIL/PLAY:** ACTION on a card can either (a) re-bind the in-place DETAIL panel (lightweight), or (b) push a `detailFocus` sub-state in the SAME handler (the ErMap dual-mode-in-one-handler trick) showing full rules/allowed/restrictions + big crest + a prominent **PLAY** button. PLAY → `config.onPlay(challenge)` → `setModeAndEnd(GameModes.CHALLENGE)` seeded with the challenge's `Challenge[]` rule set + `allowedSpecies` filter applied to Starter Select, then fire `POST /community/attempt`.

---

## 3. Card-Art Image Strategy — "TRIAL PLATES"

### 3.1 Decisive recommendation
The maintainer constraint (no bespoke per-challenge AI art) is solved by deriving each card as a **pure deterministic function of the ruleset**: a **heraldic silhouette plate**. The hero is a **type-coloured black silhouette of the existing battle sprite**, framed in the World-Map parchment/compass + Colosseum gold chrome, baked once into an LRU-cached `RenderTexture` keyed by the rule-hash (reuse the existing compositor/LRU at `src/sprites/er-shiny-lab-sprite-fx.ts:98-174,310`).

**The one correction that makes this buildable and harness-faithful:** the silhouette must be produced by **`setTint(0x000000)` on the existing battle atlas frame**, NOT by depending on a pre-baked black atlas. Grounding facts that force this:
- The black-sprite manifest is a **PILOT BATCH**, not ~7000 entries (`src/data/elite-redux/er-black-sprite-manifest.ts:17-18`), so a pre-baked black PNG is not available for an arbitrary community hero.
- `TypeShadow` is the real enum (`src/enums/color.ts:46-65`), paired with `TypeColor` (`:25-44`); `TypeDarkColor` does not exist.
- The rich shiny-lab aura is gated `typeof document === "undefined"` (`er-shiny-lab-sprite-fx.ts:239`) and uses `document.createElement("canvas")` (`:264`), so it is **skipped entirely** in the `@napi-rs` harness (no `document`) — it is runtime-only enhancement.

A **pure-black multiply (×0 per channel) is pixel-exact even under the harness's approximated offscreen-multiply**, so the silhouette identity renders byte-identical in WebGL and in the golden test (diffs at tolerance 0). The pre-baked `--black` atlas (`src/data/elite-redux/er-black-shinies.ts`) is used opportunistically only where the pilot manifest has the dex; the obsidian tint `ER_BLACK_SHINY_TINT 0x35323d` (`er-black-shinies.ts:55`) and the type-coloured rim are NON-black multiplies and are therefore demoted to approximated accent layers.

### 3.2 The plate z-stack (`buildChallengeCard` / `deriveBanner`)
Bake ~148×200 portrait, display at card size. Every load-bearing layer is a `Graphics` primitive, a `setTint` sprite, or a `NineSlice`. Back to front:

1. **Ground tincture** — 2-stop vertical fill via stacked-alpha `fillRect`s (no gradient API): top = `getTypeRgb(domType)` (`src/data/type.ts:352-395`), bottom = `TypeShadow[domType]` (`color.ts:46-65`), crushed to ~`0x141016` ink at the floor. Dual-type → **"parted per bend"** diagonal split (two `fillTriangle`s, real heraldry).
2. **Grain + vignette** — the optional shared grain PNG (§3.5) at low alpha; soft edge `strokeRect` vignette (the `drawErParchment` technique, `er-map-ui-handler.ts:128`).
3. **Sigil watermark** — `drawErCompass(g,cx,cy,r,GOLD,~0.12)` (`er-map-ui-handler.ts:78-115`) rotated by `seed`. Optional biome backdrop: `arenas/<biome>_bg.png` (boot-loaded; precedent `er-map-ui-handler.ts:14-17,346-351`) `setTint`-darkened to one ink at ~0.3 alpha so it reads as a silhouetted horizon, never a screenshot.
4. **The Beast (hero)** — front battle atlas frame (`getSpriteAtlasPath`/`loadPokemonAtlas`, `pokemon-species.ts:478,524,888`) as a **pure-black silhouette via `setTint(0x000000)`**, upscaled ~3×, anchored lower-centre. Behind it: one offset darker copy (woodcut registration shadow) + one offset accent-tinted copy (CYAN `Color.GREAT #3890f8` / MAGENTA `Color.MASTER #e020c0`, `color.ts:18,21`) = the purple/cyan rim. **For the golden baseline the rim/halo is a radial `Graphics` fill** in `getTypeRgb` (1 draw call, exact-diffable); the rich `ErShinyLabSpriteFxOverlay` aura (`er-shiny-lab-sprite-fx.ts:482,640`) is enabled only at runtime.
5. **Gold cartouche + frame** — `pwtPanel()` 9-slice + `BG_BASE` inset foot bar holding title / subtitle / clear-rate / attempts / emblem. Selected = `GOLD` `strokeRect`; featured-active = `ACTIVE_RED` halo.
6. **Reveal interaction** — on focus/select, cross-fade layer 4 from black silhouette to full-colour `anim_front` (`getSpriteId`, `pokemon-species.ts:514-526`). Browsing = a deck of inked plates; the focused one "comes alive." A feature, not a patch — it recovers per-card colour identity in the resting state.

### 3.3 `deriveBanner(challenge)` — pure function, nothing authored/stored
- **hero** = `challenge.art.themeSpeciesId` / `heroSpeciesId` if pinned; else highest-BST required/boss species; else argmax-BST over `allowedSpecies` whose primary type == `domType` (tie-broken by `seed`); else `hash(id)%allowed.length`; else a generic Gastly/Unown silhouette (open challenge).
- **domType** = mode of the type histogram over allowed/required species (cache on the record for 300+ lists), ties broken by tags (NUZLOCKE/HARDCORE → DARK/GHOST). Drives tincture, rim, emblem.
- **difficulty 1-5** = clear-rate bucket or creator-set → drives vignette darkness, frame notches, tincture brightness, ribbon (so an easy Fairy run is a bright magenta banner, not a black pit).
- **seed = `hash(challenge.id)`** → composition template (`seed%5`: centred charge / charge-on-disc / twin charges for Doubles / descending for Featherlocke / eclipsed-by-moon), gradient angle, compass rotation, idle frame, grain offset. Cache key = the same hash. Because the renderer is a pure function of *partial* data, **CREATE-NEW shows a live plate preview as the creator picks rules** (§5).

### 3.2.1 Circular emblem (wax seal) — one recipe, two sizes
Pure `Graphics`, reused 1:1 for the card corner badge (~24px) and the detail-panel crest (~32-96px):
- **Ring:** `er_pwt_crest` (`loading-scene.ts:108`) scaled, OR a procedural `drawErCompass` rose over a `FRAME_DARK 0x4a3217` disc.
- **Field:** the SAME 2-stop `getTypeRgb → TypeShadow[domType]` disc (stacked-alpha `fillCircle`s — no mask, no gradient API).
- **Charge:** hero **icon** (`getIconAtlasKey`/`getIconId`, `pokemon-species.ts:582,598`, or `er_icon__<slug>`) scaled-to-fit + alpha vignette (masks are approximated in the harness, so NO hard mask). Detail crest = this at 96px with the charge swapped back to colour.
- **Difficulty notch:** an existing ribbon frame (`items/ribbon_<type>`, `master_ribbon`, `classic_ribbon_5/10/15`) — turnkey tier emblems, zero new art.

### 3.4 Launch / empty state — "vacant standards" (zero challenges)
Empty and populated share ONE renderer because layer 4 is optional → no separate empty-state art and zero missing-texture risk:
- **Featured row:** four vacant standards = layers 1-3 + 5 with the hero OFF (dark tincture, compass watermark, a faint seed-of-the-day silhouette at ~15% alpha, cartouche "NO CHALLENGE CLAIMED — Forge the first."). One "Be the first" card carries the CREATE `+` accent pulsing `ACTIVE_RED`.
- **Detail panel:** wax seal rendered **unstamped** (gold ring + neutral-grey disc, no charge) + "Be the first to create a community challenge."
- **Community Stats:** donut at full empty-grey, centre "NO ATTEMPTS YET"; Recent / leaderboard "Nothing yet."
- **Deterministic fallback:** if a themed species sprite isn't resolvable, fall back to a generic emblem (the Assets rule in `CLAUDE.md`) so a card never shows a `__MISSING`/green box.

### 3.5 New assets — STRICTLY REQUIRED: ZERO
Every layer is procedural Graphics, an existing 9-slice, an existing sprite/icon frame, or a `setTint`. Optional, highest-value-first (follow the `CLAUDE.md` Assets workflow: copy to `../er-assets/images/…` → commit → **rebase onto origin/main** → push `HEAD:main` → staging deploy auto-resolves the jsDelivr pin → load via `src/loading-scene.ts`; note `public/images/...` 404s in the deployed build):
1. **One tileable distressed grain / torn-edge PNG** (~128-256px alpha, e.g. `images/elite-redux/ui/parchment_grain.png`) — reused on every card/panel/emblem; the single biggest fidelity lift.
2. **(reuse first)** card-aspect gold frame 9-slice — try `er_pwt_panel`/`window_*` before authoring.
3. **(optional)** radial-alpha glow PNG drawn with `BlendModes.ADD` (`@napi-rs/canvas` supports `globalCompositeOperation:'lighter'`) for true additive purple/cyan bloom (alternative to faux-bloom Graphics).
4. **(optional)** hex avatar frame PNG — if a beveled frame is wanted over a Polygon stroke.
5. **Brush-stroke display font** (`public/fonts/` + `@font-face` in `index.html:34` + `FontFace` in `i18n.ts:38`) — only if the literal painted title is required (fonts are the one asset class that lives in-repo, not er-assets). Pre-baked PNG wordmarks work only for the fixed "CHALLENGES" title, NOT dynamic per-challenge titles.
6. **Small `er_icon__ui_*` set** for crisp sidebar glyphs (optional; existing atlas frames work at launch).

### 3.6 Honest trade-off
Silhouettes drop per-card colour identity in the resting state — distinct shapes (Gengar, Mimikyu, a Flying mon) read great, similar shapes less so, and two same-type challenges look alike. **Mitigated by:** the focus→colour reveal (§3.2.6), the full-colour allowed-Pokémon icon grid + colour emblem in the detail panel, seed-driven template/pose variety, and a creator "lit portrait" toggle for challenges that need the face. **Upside:** a single coherent dark-fantasy canon across all 2000+ mons that hides sprite-quality variance, zero authored/stored art at infinite scale, a free empty state from the same pipeline, deterministic shareable identity, and a 1:1 match to the shipping World-Map / Colosseum chrome.

---

## 4. Data Model + Worker Endpoints + Anti-Cheat / Verification

Everything drops into the existing `workers/er-save-api` worker on the same `DB` binding, reusing the self-creating-table pattern (`ensureDevTestTable`, `index.ts:1343-1359`), so **no migration step** is needed. The router gets one public block and one authenticated block in the existing ladder (`index.ts:1655-1735`), wrapped by the same try/catch→500.

### 4.1 D1 schema (3 tables + indexes, self-creating)
`ensureCommunityTables(env)` — a `let communityTablesReady=false` guard running these `CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS` + `CREATE INDEX` once per isolate, called at the top of every `/community/*` handler (exact shape of `ensureDevTestTable` / `ensureNotificationsTable`, `index.ts:935,1344-1358`). Lazy `ALTER TABLE community_challenges ADD COLUMN` for future knobs mirrors `ensureRunStatColumns` (`index.ts:1404-1427`).

```sql
-- The challenge DEFINITION + denormalized counters so browse/donut/clear-rate are O(1) reads.
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS community_challenges (
  id              TEXT    PRIMARY KEY,            -- creator/slug-generated
  title           TEXT    NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  subtitle        TEXT    NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  description     TEXT    NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  config_json     TEXT    NOT NULL,              -- the run-config (verification source of truth) — §4.4
  seed            TEXT,                          -- non-null = fixed-seed challenge; null = open-seed
  difficulty      TEXT,                          -- denormalized for filter; ErDifficulty
  game_mode_id    INTEGER,                       -- GameModes.CHALLENGE / COOP
  target_wave     INTEGER,                       -- a clear must reach this (<=200, the /sample ceiling)
  tags            TEXT,                          -- JSON string[]  (chips: NUZLOCKE/RANDOMIZER/HARDCORE)
  art_json        TEXT,                          -- deterministic card-art recipe from EXISTING assets (§3)
  emblem_json     TEXT,                          -- crest/difficulty-emblem recipe (existing assets)
  created_by      TEXT,                          -- author display name
  created_by_uid  INTEGER,                       -- author users.id (MY CHALLENGES filter)
  created_at      INTEGER NOT NULL,
  published_at    INTEGER,                       -- set when founder clear verifies -> goes live
  status          TEXT    NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft', -- 'draft'|'active'|'hidden'|'rejected'
  founder_clear_id TEXT,                         -- the creator's proving victory (required for 'active')
  featured_rank   INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,    -- admin curation; >0 = FEATURED row slot order
  trending_score  REAL    NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,    -- decayed recent-attempt score (nightly cron)
  attempts_total  INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,    -- distinct participants
  cleared_count   INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  failed_count    INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  inprogress_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  best_wave       INTEGER,
  fastest_clear_ms INTEGER,
  first_clear_user TEXT,  first_clear_at INTEGER, -- "First Clear by ..."
  updated_at      INTEGER NOT NULL
);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_cc_browse ON community_challenges (status, featured_rank DESC, trending_score DESC);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_cc_newest ON community_challenges (status, created_at DESC);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_cc_author ON community_challenges (created_by_uid, created_at DESC);

-- ONE current attempt-record per (challenge,user). Status is a 3-way partition so the donut sums to 100%.
-- UPSERT keeps it idempotent + 1 write/sync (the session_saves budget rule). 'cleared' is sticky.
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS community_challenge_attempts (
  challenge_id  TEXT    NOT NULL,
  user_id       INTEGER NOT NULL,
  username      TEXT,
  status        TEXT    NOT NULL,           -- 'in_progress'|'cleared'|'failed'
  wave          INTEGER,                    -- best wave reached
  clear_time_ms INTEGER,                    -- fastest verified clear (for the board)
  player_team   TEXT,                       -- JSON GhostMember[] (only on a verified clear)
  challenges    TEXT,                       -- [[id,value,severity]] actually run (must match config)
  run_seed      TEXT,                       -- the run's seed (config-match for fixed-seed challenges)
  verified      INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, -- 1 = passed config-match + IV + ban checks
  replay_trace  TEXT,                       -- OPTIONAL opaque ReplayTrace blob (offline revalidation)
  started_at    INTEGER NOT NULL,
  updated_at    INTEGER NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (challenge_id, user_id)
);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_cca_board  ON community_challenge_attempts (challenge_id, verified, status, wave DESC, clear_time_ms ASC);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_cca_recent ON community_challenge_attempts (challenge_id, status, updated_at DESC);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_cca_user   ON community_challenge_attempts (user_id, updated_at DESC); -- HISTORY tab

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS community_challenge_bookmarks (
  user_id      INTEGER NOT NULL,
  challenge_id TEXT    NOT NULL,
  created_at   INTEGER NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (user_id, challenge_id)
);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_ccb_user ON community_challenge_bookmarks (user_id, created_at DESC);
```

**Counter maintenance is incremental, not a recount.** On every attempt UPSERT: `SELECT status` for the old row (1 read), compute the `(old→new)` delta, then `DB.batch([upsert attempt, UPDATE community_challenges SET inprogress_count = inprogress_count + Δ, cleared_count = …, attempts_total = attempts_total + (isNew?1:0), best_wave=MAX(...), updated_at=…])`. O(1) reads/write — deliberately avoiding the full-table-scan trap that broke the ghost `/sample` query (`index.ts:1180-1199`). `cleared` is sticky: once a row is `cleared`, status never downgrades.

**Trending** is recomputed by the existing scheduled cron (`index.ts:1639-1641`, `ctx.waitUntil`): once/day, over the small active set, `trending_score = Σ recent attempts with exponential time-decay (7d half-life)`, written back to the row — same nightly-aggregate template as `computeAndPublishUsageTiers` (gated by the prod-only `canPublishUsageTiers` pattern, `index.ts:1441`, so staging never publishes).

**Empty-launch state is structural, not special-cased:** every challenge is `status='draft'` until its founder clear verifies, and browse/featured only ever read `status='active'`, so `GET /community/challenges` and `GET /community/featured` return `[]` cleanly with no placeholder rows.

### 4.2 `/community/*` endpoints
Reuse verbatim: `corsHeaders` (`index.ts:225-234`), `json`/`text` (`:236-241`), `parseFormBody` (urlencoded or JSON, `:244-265`), `readSaveBody` (4 MB cap via `MAX_SAVE_BYTES`, `:386-392`), `authUser` (`:268-278`), the OPTIONS short-circuit (`:1650-1652`).

**Public (no auth — read-only, like `/devtest/*` and `/game/titlestats`):**

| Route | Query | Response |
|---|---|---|
| `GET /community/featured` | `count` (clamp 1–20) | `{ challenges: CardDTO[] }` — `status='active'`, `featured_rank>0 ORDER BY featured_rank`; falls back to top `trending_score` when nothing curated. Cache 60s via the Cache API (copy `handleTitleStats`, `index.ts:764`). |
| `GET /community/challenges` | `sort` (`trending`\|`newest`\|`clearRate`\|`attempts`\|`hardest`), `difficulty`, `tag`, `q`, `limit`(≤30), `offset` | `{ challenges: CardDTO[], total, nextOffset }` — BROWSE grid. Always `WHERE status='active'`. Returns `items:[]` (200) when empty. |
| `GET /community/challenge?id=` | — | `{ challenge: DetailDTO, stats: StatsDTO, leaderboard: ClearDTO[], recent: ClearDTO[] }` — detail + donut + recent + board in one round-trip. 404 if hidden. |
| `GET /community/leaderboard?id=&count=` | `count`≤50 | `{ entries: ClearDTO[] }` — `WHERE challenge_id=? AND verified=1 AND status='cleared' ORDER BY wave DESC, clear_time_ms ASC`. |

`CardDTO = {id,title,subtitle,art,emblem,difficulty,tags,clearRate,attempts,featuredRank}` where `clearRate = cleared_count / NULLIF(attempts_total,0)`. `DetailDTO` adds `description, createdBy, firstClearUser`, and rules/restrictions/allowedSpecies derived from `config_json`. `StatsDTO = {attempts:attempts_total, clearedPct, inProgressPct, failedPct}`. `ClearDTO = {username, wave, clearTimeMs, when:updated_at}`.

**Authenticated (`authUser` gate):**

| Route | Body / Query | Behavior |
|---|---|---|
| `POST /community/challenge` | `{id?,title,subtitle,description,config,tags,art,emblem}` JSON | **Create draft.** `validateChallengeConfig()` (er-editor-api style: whitelist keys, clamp list lengths, `baseChallenges` ids ∈ `Challenges`, species ids numeric, tags ≤ N). Insert `status='draft'`. Returns `{id}`. |
| `POST /community/clear` | full run JSON (`GhostTeamSnapshot`, `er-ghost-teams.ts:92-125`) + `{challengeId}` | **The verification endpoint (§4.3).** Idempotent UPSERT on `(challenge_id,user_id)`. The creator's first verified victory flips the challenge to `active`. |
| `POST /community/attempt` | `{challengeId, wave?}` | **Record in-progress** at run start. UPSERT `status='in_progress'` only if no `cleared` row exists; bumps `inprogress_count`/`attempts_total`. Best-effort; powers the donut IN-PROGRESS slice. |
| `POST /community/attempt/fail` | `{challengeId, wave}` | Marks `failed` if not already `cleared`. |
| `POST /community/bookmark` | `{challengeId, on:boolean}` | Toggle INSERT/DELETE on bookmarks. |
| `GET /community/mine` | — | MY CHALLENGES: `WHERE created_by_uid=auth.uid ORDER BY created_at DESC` (any status, so drafts show). |
| `GET /community/bookmarks` | — | BOOKMARKS: join bookmarks→challenges. |
| `GET /community/history` | — | HISTORY: `attempts WHERE user_id=auth.uid ORDER BY updated_at DESC` joined to challenge title/art. |
| `POST /community/moderate` | `{challengeId, action:'hide'\|'unhide'\|'reject', reason?}` | **Admin-only** (`users.is_admin`, read via `handleAccountInfo` pattern `index.ts:335-337`). Sets `status='hidden'`/`'rejected'`. |

**Client wiring** (two existing patterns): a `PokerogueCommunityApi extends ApiBase` hung off `PokerogueApi` (`src/api/api.ts:9-22`) gives authed routes the auto `Authorization` header + 15s `AbortController` timeout for free (`src/api/api-base.ts:93-116`); the public/read surface additionally uses a raw `fetch(${VITE_SERVER_URL}/community/…)` module copying the **null-guard graceful-degradation** contract of `postRunToServer`/`sampleRunsFromServer` (`er-ghost-teams.ts:256-304`: `if (!base || !token) return fallback`, never throws), exactly like the `/devtest/*` client. The shared `validateChallengeConfig()` must be **copied into the worker** (workers can't import `src/`); add a parity vitest test that client and worker validators agree.

### 4.3 Verification / anti-cheat flow
`handleCommunityClear(request, auth, env, cors)` on `POST /community/clear`. A challenge goes live only after a config-matching, IV-clean, pool-legal VICTORY. Every primitive is **reused** from the existing run-upload path (`handleRunCreate`, `index.ts:848-906`):

1. **Auth + size + parse** — `authUser` (`:1682`); `readSaveBody` (4 MB cap, `:386-392`); `JSON.parse`; require `id` + `party` array exactly as `handleRunCreate` (`:848-851`).
2. **Load the challenge** by `challengeId`; `404` if absent. If `status !== 'active'` and `auth.uid !== created_by_uid` → `403` (only the creator may submit to a not-yet-live challenge — the publish path).
3. **Config-match** against `config_json`:
   - **Outcome/wave:** `outcome === 'victory'` (same derivation as `index.ts:867-868`) AND `wave >= target_wave` AND `wave <= 200` (the `MAX_GHOST_SAMPLE_WAVE` ceiling, `:1200` — endless contamination guard).
   - **Difficulty:** `run.difficulty === config.difficulty` (`ErDifficulty`).
   - **Game mode:** `run.gameModeId === config.gameModeId`.
   - **Challenges array:** the submitted `challenges` (`ChallengeData[] {id,value,severity}`, `src/system/challenge-data.ts:4-21`) deep-equals `config.baseChallenges` order-insensitively by `id`. (Difficulty + the `{id,value,severity}` set fully define the ruleset; the **seed pins the run**.)
   - **Allowed-species gate:** if `config.allowedSpecies` is set, every party member's root species ∈ the list (resolve ER megas→base then `getRootSpeciesId`, the `UsageTierChallenge.resolveRoot` rule, `src/data/challenge.ts:1387-1390`).
   - **Seed:** for a fixed-seed challenge (`community_challenges.seed` non-null), `run_seed` must equal it; open-seed challenges skip.
   - Any mismatch → store the attempt `verified=0` (still counts toward stats); for the founder-publish path return `422 {reason}` without publishing.
4. **IV clamp + tamper flag** — run the **exact** clamp loop from `handleRunCreate` (`index.ts:856-866`): `ivs.map(iv => clamp(0,31,floor(Number(iv))))`. **Stricter than the ghost pool:** if the clamped party differs from the submitted party (any IV was >31), set `verified=0` — a verified clear must have had *legitimately legal* IVs, not merely neutralized ones.
5. **Hacked-mon / banned-form / legendary-line check** — apply `isErGhostTeamLegal` semantics (`er-ghost-teams.ts:230-240`): reject any `BANNED_GHOST_SPECIES_IDS` (`:165-177`, e.g. Eternamax/Zacian-Crowned/Origin formes), any `BANNED_GHOST_FORMS` (`:184-195`), and ≥2 legendary-egg-only lines on one team (`isLegendaryEggLine`, `:220-227`). Port the int/regex constants into the worker (or trust the client filter for v1 and re-validate offline). Fail → `verified=0`.
6. **Store + publish** — only when 3–5 pass, `verified=1`. UPSERT the attempt (`status='cleared'`, sticky), update counters incrementally (§4.1), set `first_clear_*` if null, bump `best_wave`/`fastest_clear_ms`. **If this is the creator's founder clear and `status='draft'`:** `UPDATE community_challenges SET status='active', published_at=now, founder_clear_id=run.id` — **the go-live gate**. Invisible in browse/featured until this lands.
7. **Notify** (optional, zero new client plumbing) — on a verified non-founder clear, `ensureNotificationsTable` + `INSERT INTO notifications (username=creator, kind='reward', …)` (`index.ts:935-954`); the existing inbox surfaces "Solaris cleared your challenge."
8. **Replay trace** — stash the optional `replay_trace` blob untouched. **Not** verified in-Worker: `replayCoopTrace` boots a real `GameManager`/Phaser `BattleScene`, which cannot run in the CF isolate, and recording is host-only co-op keeping the last 6 waves (`replay-trace.ts`, `replay-recorder.ts`, CLAUDE.md #record-replay). v1 verifies by config-match; the trace rides along for later **offline** revalidation through the duo/single-engine harness once a single-engine loader lands.

### 4.4 Stats derivation (donut / clear-rate / attempts / recent / leaderboard)
All driven off the denormalized counters (single-row read) + the attempts index — no scans.
- **Attempts headline** = `attempts_total`. **Clear rate** = `cleared_count / NULLIF(attempts_total,0)`.
- **Donut** (sums to 100% by construction, 3-way partition): `clearedPct/inProgressPct/failedPct = (cleared|inprogress|failed)_count / attempts_total`. CLEARED green / IN-PROGRESS blue / FAILED red.
- **Recent completions:** `SELECT username, updated_at … WHERE challenge_id=? AND status='cleared' ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 5` (uses `idx_cca_recent`).
- **Leaderboard:** `WHERE challenge_id=? AND verified=1 AND status='cleared' ORDER BY wave DESC, clear_time_ms ASC LIMIT n` (uses `idx_cca_board`). "First Clear by" = `first_clear_user`.
- Budget note: counters are incrementally updated, so the donut/clear-rate are free at read time; only `/community/attempt` adds a write per participant. If true *total-playthrough* counts are ever wanted, swap the PK for a per-run `attempt_id` and aggregate — at the cost of unbounded rows + a recount.

### 4.5 Reuse map (borrowed vs genuinely new)
**Reused wholesale** — D1 `DB` binding + `wrangler.toml`; self-creating-table + lazy-`ALTER` (`ensureDevTestTable` `:1343-1359`, `ensureRunStatColumns` `:1404-1427`); `corsHeaders`/`json`/`text`/`parseFormBody`/`authUser`/`readSaveBody` (`:225-392`); router public/auth split (`:1655-1735`); the **IV clamp** (`:856-866`); the **ban/legendary-line checks** `isErGhostTeamLegal` (`er-ghost-teams.ts:165-240`); the wave-200 gate (`:1200`); the `GhostMember`/`GhostTeamSnapshot` JSON shape (`:67-125`); the idempotent `ON CONFLICT` UPSERT (runs `DO NOTHING` `:876-899`, session `DO UPDATE` `:639-647`); the `notifications` push (`:935-954`); the nightly `scheduled` cron (`:1639-1641`); the prod-only publish gate (`canPublishUsageTiers :1441`); the `ApiBase`+`PokerogueApi` client + the raw-`fetch`/graceful-degradation pattern (`api.ts:9-22`, `er-ghost-teams.ts:256-304`).
**Genuinely new** — the 3 tables + `ensureCommunityTables`; `handleCommunityClear` + the browse/detail/create/attempt/bookmark/moderate handlers; the `allowedSpecies` `Challenge` subclass + its `ChallengeData` field; the per-run economy-config layer (§5).
**Deliberately deferred** — in-Worker engine replay verification (needs full Phaser/`GameManager`); v1 is config-match.

---

## 5. Creator Flow + Knob → Config Mapping

### 5.1 `CommunityChallengeCreateUiHandler` (UiMode 70)
A 4-tab designer modeled on ErShinyLab's tab + slider + live-preview structure (`er-shiny-lab-ui-handler.ts:354-431, 1152-1421`). Tabs across `RIGHT_W`, underline rectangle on the active tab, `<`/`>` chevrons:
- **Tab 1 — BASICS:** name + description via `addTextInputObject` (`src/ui/text.ts:68`); difficulty 1-5 as a segmented slider (array of small `rectangle`s, `er-shiny-lab-ui-handler.ts:1168-1180`).
- **Tab 2 — MODIFIERS (toggles):** randomized encounters / abilities / moves / no-items / set-mode / level-cap / nuzlocke-box — each a reusable row with a checkbox `rectangle` (GOLD when on). LEFT/RIGHT or ACTION toggles.
- **Tab 3 — ALLOWED SPECIES:** a scrolling/grid picker (reuse the `getIconId` grid + the scrolling-list window, `er-shiny-lab-ui-handler.ts:797-827`; or the starter-grid multiselect); ACTION toggles a species in/out of `allowedSpecies`; a live type-histogram readout drives the preview's `domType`.
- **Tab 4 — ECONOMY/PACING:** money rate, shop frequency, level cap per gym — segmented sliders (the `adjustTune` pattern, `er-shiny-lab-ui-handler.ts:1376-1421`).
- **LIVE PLATE PREVIEW** (left pane): `deriveBanner(partialChallenge)` re-baked on every knob change — because the renderer is a pure function of partial data, the creator watches the plate form as they pick rules.
- **Nav:** L/R switch tabs, U/D pick a control row, L/R adjust, ACTION confirm-row, `Y`/"Publish" → validate + `POST /community/challenge` (status `draft`), CANCEL → back to browse. Hint bar variant per tab.

A simpler MVP create form is acceptable: a guided `OPTION_SELECT`/form (name/description, base-challenge picks via the existing CHALLENGE_SELECT widgets, allowed-species multiselect, restriction toggles, art theme species) → `POST /community/challenge`.

### 5.2 Publish gate (verify-by-config-match, author self-verify)
The author must complete their own challenge once. On run completion, the existing `/savedata/run` upload (`er-ghost-teams.ts:263`) is extended to include `communityChallengeId` + the realized `challenges`; `POST /community/clear` runs §4.3. On successful self-verify → `status` flips to `published`/`active`, `first_clear_user` recorded. This is what makes a challenge appear in BROWSE. Stats update on every community run end (`clears++`/`in_progress--` verified, or `failed`).

### 5.3 Knob → config application seams

| Knob | Application seam (file:line) | Status |
|---|---|---|
| **difficulty** | `setErDifficulty(difficulty)` at the launch block `src/ui/handlers/starter-select-ui-handler.ts:6278-6282`, replacing the interactive youngster/ace/elite/hell `OPTION_SELECT` (`:6399-6408`). Auto-persists `SessionSaveData.erDifficulty` (`game-data.ts:1327`). | **Exists** |
| **baseChallenges** | `getGameMode(GameModes.CHALLENGE)` clones `allChallenges` (`src/game-mode.ts:585-595`), then per entry `gameMode.setChallengeValue(id,value,severity)` (`:93-106`); enter `SelectStarterPhase` skipping `CHALLENGE_SELECT`. All `value!==0` challenges fire through `applyChallenges` (`src/data/challenge-utils.ts:273-351`). Auto-persists as `ChallengeData[]` (`game-data.ts:1321`). | **Exists** (15 enum members, `src/enums/challenges.ts`) |
| **allowedSpecies** + **restrictions** | A **new `CommunityFilterChallenge` subclass** registered in `initChallenges` (`challenge.ts:1583`) holding `number[]` + restriction flags, overriding `applyStarterChoice`/`STARTER_CHOICE` (`challenge.ts:223`), `applyPokemonAddToParty`/`POKEMON_ADD_TO_PARTY` (`:394`), `applyPokemonInBattle`/`POKEMON_IN_BATTLE` (`:272`) — copy `UsageTierChallenge` (`challenge.ts:1361-1487`) verbatim, swap `isErLineLegalForUsageTier` for `list.includes(resolveRoot(species))` (`resolveRoot` at `:1387`). Persist via a new optional `ChallengeData.allowedSpecies?: number[]` field (mirror the `startingRoots?` precedent, `src/system/challenge-data.ts:8`); round-trip through `toChallenge()`/ctor. | **New subclass** (precedent is the exact 3-gate `UsageTier`/`SingleType`/`MonoColor` shape) |
| `economy.startLevel` / `startMoney` | `GameMode.getStartingLevel`/`getStartingMoney` (`game-mode.ts:153-188`), consumed at `starter-select-ui-handler.ts:6316`. | Per-run seam exists; today reads global `Overrides` — needs the config read inserted |
| `economy.shopFreq` (+ party-heal) | `applyShop`/`SHOP` (`GameMode.getShopStatus`, `game-mode.ts:457-461`) and `applyPartyHeal`/`PARTY_HEAL`. Precedent `LimitedSupportChallenge:1166-1174`. | **Exists** (per-run challenge hook) |
| `constraints.itemBans` | `applyShopItem`/`SHOP_ITEM` + `applyWaveReward`/`WAVE_REWARD`. Precedent `HardcoreChallenge:1237-1244`. | **Exists** |
| `constraints.moveBans` | `applyPokemonMove`/`POKEMON_MOVE`. Precedent `HardcoreChallenge:1246`. | **Exists** |
| `economy.goldMult`/`xpMult`/`trainerFreq`/`meRate`; `constraints.abilityBans` | Only **global** seams today: `getWaveMoneyAmount`/`MoneyRewardPhase` (`src/battle-scene.ts:3338-3343`); `XP_MULTIPLIER_OVERRIDE` (`:4349`); `GameMode.isWaveTrainer`+`erForcesTrainerWave` (`src/data/elite-redux/er-battle-frequency.ts:116-127`); `MYSTERY_ENCOUNTER_RATE_OVERRIDE`. Ability bans have **no hook at all**. | **New** — implement the scaffolded-but-unimplemented dispatch slots `AI_LEVEL`/`MOVE_ACCESS`/`GAME_MODE_MODIFY` (`src/enums/challenge-type.ts:46-65`) + a small per-run config the launch reads **instead of** the static `Overrides`; add one new `ChallengeType` for ability bans |

`GameMode.applyCommunityChallengeConfig(config)` loops `config.baseChallenges` → `setChallengeValue` (`:93`) and seeds the filter challenge. The whole `config_json` serializes 1:1 to the run's persisted `{gameModeId, challenges: ChallengeData[], erDifficulty, seed, allowedSpecies}` (`src/system/save-data.ts:60-137`, `game-data.ts:1299-1346`) — exactly what config-match compares.

### 5.4 Engine verification (standing rule)
Any engine change → a `ScenarioSpec`/vitest under `test/tests/elite-redux/` proving the behavior (CLAUDE.md). Specifically: a config with `allowedSpecies=[X]` + `noLegendary` must actually block an illegal starter/catch. Author it with the headless scenario runner (`node scripts/run-scenario.mjs`) and show a green `expect`.

---

## 6. Phasing + Ordered Task List

MVP-first. Backend first (so the client has something to talk to), then engine config, then UI, then verify, then harness/tests/deploy. Atomic, ordered.

### Phase 1 — MVP (browse + play + create + verify; NO rewards)

**P1-A. Backend: schema + CRUD (D1)**
1. Extend `er-save-api` (Open Q #1): add `community_challenges` + `community_challenge_attempts` + `community_challenge_bookmarks` in `workers/er-save-api/schema.sql` AND `ensureCommunityTables()` lazy-create (mirror `ensureNotificationsTable :935` / `ensureDevTestTable :1344`).
2. `POST /community/challenge` (auth) with `validateChallengeConfig()`. Insert `status='draft'`. Return `{id}`.
3. `GET /community/challenges` (public) — feeds/sort/filter/paging; Cache API 60s for featured; always 200 + `items:[]` when empty.
4. `GET /community/challenge?id=` (public) — full config + stats + leaderboard + recent; 404 if hidden.
5. `POST /community/attempt` (auth) — idempotent `INSERT OR IGNORE`/UPSERT keyed `(challenge_id,user)`.
6. `POST /community/bookmark` + `GET /community/bookmarks`.
7. Wire all routes into the `fetch` router (`index.ts:1655-1735`) under `authUser` where authed.
8. `npx wrangler dev` smoke of each route against local D1 (no prod). Evidence: curl transcripts.

**P1-B. Engine: community-challenge config → run**
9. `CommunityFilterChallenge` subclass in `src/data/challenge.ts` (copy `UsageTierChallenge:1361-1487`); register in `allChallenges` + the `copyChallenge`/`loadChallenge` switch.
10. Extend `ChallengeData` with optional `allowedSpecies?: number[]` + `restrictions?` (precedent `startingRoots? :8`); round-trip.
11. `GameMode.applyCommunityChallengeConfig(config)` (loop `setChallengeValue` + seed the filter). (Economy knobs deferred — Open Q #4.)
12. Headless verify scenario under `test/tests/elite-redux/` proving `allowedSpecies=[X]`+`noLegendary` blocks an illegal starter/catch.

**P1-C. Client data layer**
13. New `src/data/elite-redux/er-community-challenges.ts`: typed `CommunityChallengeConfig`, a `fetch`-based API client (mirror `er-ghost-teams.ts` graceful-degradation), and `validateChallengeConfig()` shared with the worker (copy into the worker too).
14. Persist "my drafts" + bookmarks in a degrade-gracefully local cache (the devtest local/remote fallback).

**P1-D. UiMode + submenu entry**
15. Append `UiMode.COMMUNITY_CHALLENGES` (+ `COMMUNITY_CHALLENGE_CREATE`) to `src/enums/ui-mode.ts:68`.
16. Replace the single `CHALLENGE` option in `title-phase.ts:151-157` with a Challenge-Mode `OPTION_SELECT` submenu {Custom → `CHALLENGE_SELECT`; Community → `setOverlayMode(UiMode.COMMUNITY_CHALLENGES)`}, behind the existing `ENDLESS_MODE` unlock gate (`:150`) + the dev-tools staging gate.
17. From the browser's "Play": `GameMode.applyCommunityChallengeConfig` → `setModeAndEnd(GameModes.CHALLENGE)` → `SelectStarterPhase`; fire `POST /community/attempt`.

**P1-E. Browser screen (`CommunityChallengesUiHandler`)**
18. New `src/ui/handlers/community-challenges-ui-handler.ts`, registered in `src/ui/ui.ts`; build the full layout per §2 (MVP-trimmed: COMMUNITY crest + avatar/rank are cosmetic stubs; VIEW LEADERBOARD disabled).
19. `processInput`: sidebar nav, card cursor, detail focus, paging, bookmark toggle, Create → CREATE flow. Lazy-load list pages; LOADING state while in flight.
20. **ZERO-at-launch empty states (explicit):** featured `items:[]` → 4 placeholder "vacant standard" cards (NOT green `__MISSING` boxes); browse empty → centered "No community challenges yet. Press Y to create one."; MINE/BOOKMARKS/HISTORY → one-line empty copy each; donut zero-attempts → empty grey ring + "No attempts yet."; recent → "No clears yet."

**P1-F. Card-art compositor**
21. New `src/ui/community-challenge-card.ts`: `buildChallengeCard(scene, config): RenderTexture` per §3.2 (type/biome tincture + black-silhouette hero via `setTint(0x000000)` + gold frame + overlay text + difficulty emblem), LRU-cached by rule-hash.
22. Deterministic fallback to a generic emblem when the themed species sprite isn't resolvable (the Assets rule) — same path renders the empty-state placeholder cards.
23. Unit-test the compositor key-resolution with the Tier-1 headless UI runner (resolved sprite KEY assertions) before pixels.

**P1-G. Verify / create flow + anti-cheat reuse**
24. Create flow (MVP form or the 4-tab designer, §5.1) → `POST /community/challenge` (`draft`).
25. Verify-by-config-match (`POST /community/clear`, §4.3): extend the `/savedata/run` body with `communityChallengeId` + realized `challenges`; assert `realized.baseChallenges ⊇ config` AND `player_team ⊆ allowedSpecies` AND restrictions hold AND outcome/wave self-consistent.
26. Reuse the existing IV-clamp/sanitization (`index.ts:856`) + `isErGhostTeamLegal` bans — no new anti-cheat engine.
27. On self-verify → flip `status='active'`; record `first_clear_user`.
28. Stats update on every community run end (donut/clear-rate feed).
29. Economy/pacing knobs: **defer to P2** (global today; per-run not free) — ship P1 with existing `Challenges` knobs + the new species filter.

**P1-H. Harness recipe + tests + dev scenarios**
30. Add `community-challenges` recipes to `RECIPES` (`test/tools/render-ui-page.test.ts:293+`) via a self-contained `buildDemoChallengesConfig()` (the ErShinyLab `buildDemoConfig` trick):
```ts
"community-challenges":       { mode: UiMode.COMMUNITY_CHALLENGES,
    prepare: () => [buildDemoChallengesConfig({ populated: true })], diffTolerance: 0 },
"community-challenges-empty": { mode: UiMode.COMMUNITY_CHALLENGES,
    prepare: () => [buildDemoChallengesConfig({ populated: false })] },
"community-challenges-nav":   { mode: UiMode.COMMUNITY_CHALLENGES,
    prepare: () => [buildDemoChallengesConfig({ populated: true })],
    steps: [Button.RIGHT, Button.RIGHT, Button.DOWN, Button.DOWN, Button.ACTION] },
"community-challenge-create": { mode: UiMode.COMMUNITY_CHALLENGE_CREATE,
    prepare: () => [buildDemoCreateConfig()], steps: [Button.RIGHT, Button.DOWN, Button.RIGHT] },
```
Run: `ER_SCENARIO=1 ER_RENDER_PAGE=community-challenges,community-challenges-empty,community-challenges-nav,community-challenge-create pnpm vitest run test/tools/render-ui-page.test.ts`. Outputs under `dev-logs/ui-pages/`, golden-diffed against `test/tools/ui-baselines/<page>.png` (re-baseline with `ER_UPDATE_BASELINE=1`). The harness asserts `handlers[recipe.mode]` is defined, so register (§2.0) first. NB the `restoreSpriteTextureMethods` clobber is the #1 suspect if icon grids/silhouettes blank; genuinely-absent `er_icon__<slug>` keys show green `__MISSING` boxes (asset gap, not a bug).
31. In-game dev test-suite scenarios (`src/dev-tools/test-suite/scenarios.ts`) — note-entries: "open Community Challenges with zero published → EXPECT placeholder cards, not missing boxes"; "create + self-verify a doubles + mono-species challenge → EXPECT it appears in Browse".
32. Vitest: worker route tests (create/list/get/attempt/clear, empty-feed returns `items:[]`); engine test for `CommunityFilterChallenge`; config-validator parity test (client vs worker agree).
33. Tier-1 UI runner surface for the handler (crash-to-black/missing-sprite guard).

**P1-I. Deploy gates**
34. Push to `feat/elite-redux-port`; staging is self-serve (`gh workflow run deploy-staging.yml --ref feat/elite-redux-port -R Heraklines/elite-redux`). Keep CREATE behind a feature flag until verified.
35. Worker deploy is **maintainer-only**: hand off `cd workers/er-save-api && npx wrangler deploy` (tables self-create via lazy-migration, no manual `d1 execute`). Client degrades gracefully (local-only, empty feeds) until the maintainer deploys, exactly like the `/devtest/*` activation note.
36. **Do not deploy prod** without explicit permission; keep the feature gated until staging QA passes.

### Phase 2 — rewards, moderation, server-verification, richer constraints, leaderboards

**P2-A. Clear-rate-driven rewards / golden tickets**
1. **Reuse the existing reward inbox** — do NOT build new delivery: `notifications` already supports `kind='reward'` + JSON `payload {species,shiny,variant}` (`schema.sql:113`, `handleNotifications :956`). Add server-side reward-grant inserts keyed off verified clears.
2. Worker computes a rarity/golden-ticket tier from live clear-rate (clear-rate < threshold → golden ticket) in the nightly cron (`:1638`), behind the prod-only publish gate (`canPublishUsageTiers :1441`) so staging never grants real rewards.
3. Client inbox renders the reward (already polled). Add a "golden ticket" payload type + icon (composited from existing assets).
4. Anti-farm: rewards only on first verified clear per `(user,challenge)`; cap per day; require P2-C server-verification for high-value rewards.

**P2-B. Moderation / reporting**
5. `POST /community/report` (auth): `community_challenge_reports(challenge_id, reporter, reason, created_at)`.
6. Auto-hide on report threshold; `status='hidden'` removes from feeds.
7. Maintainer review/curation via `is_admin` routes (`users.is_admin`, `schema.sql:17`) — also how Featured is curated (Open Q #2).
8. Name/description profanity + length validation server-side (extend `validateChallengeConfig`).

**P2-C. ReplayTrace server-verification**
9. Upgrade config-match → deterministic replay. Enable the single-player recording tap (`beginReplayRecording` from the classic launch; taps already exist, OFF by design) so a community clear carries a `replayTrace`.
10. Server (or a maintainer-run offline verifier — Open Q #5) re-runs the trace against the config before granting golden-ticket rewards. Cheap path: config-match for stats, replay only for high-value rewards.
11. Add a `coop-duo-replay`-style closed-loop regression that replays a captured community clear and asserts verification.

**P2-D. Richer constraints**
12. Extend `CommunityFilterChallenge` + config: banned moves/abilities/items, level caps per gym, forced doubles + slot rules, biome routing locks, ME on/off — wiring the currently-`UNIMPLEMENTED` `ChallengeType` hooks (`src/enums/challenge-type.ts:46` AI_LEVEL, `:99` POKEMON_MOVE, `:103` SHOP_ITEM, `:108` WAVE_REWARD). Each with a headless scenario.
13. Per-run economy/pacing hooks (the P1 deferral): real `GameMode` per-run overrides for starting money / level cap / gold / xp / trainer-freq / ME-rate, replacing global `Overrides` reads.

**P2-E. Leaderboards**
14. `GET /community/leaderboard?id=` modeled on the deadliest-ghost aggregation (`handleRunDeadliest :1271`).
15. Wire the VIEW LEADERBOARD button to a sub-screen (its own `PAGE_RECIPES` recipe + scenario).
16. RECENT COMPLETIONS backed by the verified-clears query (P1 may stub with empty state).

**P2-F. Harness/tests/deploy** — new recipes for leaderboard + reward inbox; baselines updated; worker route + cron tests; reward-granting cron behind the prod publish gate; maintainer-only worker prod deploy.

**Key files to touch:** `workers/er-save-api/src/index.ts` (+`schema.sql`), `src/enums/challenges.ts`, `src/enums/ui-mode.ts`, `src/enums/challenge-type.ts`, `src/data/challenge.ts`, `src/system/challenge-data.ts`, `src/game-mode.ts`, `src/phases/title-phase.ts`, `src/data/elite-redux/er-ghost-teams.ts`, new `src/data/elite-redux/er-community-challenges.ts`, new `src/ui/handlers/community-challenges-ui-handler.ts`, new `src/ui/handlers/community-challenge-create-ui-handler.ts`, new `src/ui/community-challenge-card.ts`, `src/ui/ui.ts`, `test/tools/render-ui-page.test.ts`, `src/dev-tools/test-suite/scenarios.ts`, `test/tests/elite-redux/`.

---

## 7. Open Questions for the Maintainer

1. **Backend host.** Extend `er-save-api` (recommended — reuses `authUser`, `runs` for verify, lazy-migration, cron, the reward inbox) vs. a new `er-challenge-api` worker sharing the same D1 `database_id`. Affects deploy/ownership.
2. **Who curates FEATURED at launch (zero challenges)?** Maintainer-pinned via an `is_admin` route (`featured_rank`), or automatic "newest/trending" once content exists. Until then, the "vacant standards" placeholder cards (§3.4).
3. **Config storage.** D1 row JSON (recommended — mutable, query-friendly, user-owned, high-volume) vs. the `er-editor-api` GitHub-commit model (immutable, reviewable, but heavier, not per-user-scalable). The UGC parallel is `er-editor-api`, but challenges are higher-volume → D1.
4. **Which knobs ship in P1?** Recommend P1 = existing `Challenges` knobs + the new species filter + restrictions, with **economy/pacing deferred to P2** (per-run money/level-cap/gold/xp/trainer-freq/ME-rate are global today in `er-balance-tuning.json`; per-run hooks are net-new, including the reserved `AI_LEVEL`/`MOVE_ACCESS`/`GAME_MODE_MODIFY` slots and a new ability-ban `ChallengeType`).
5. **Reward model (P2).** When rewards land, confirm: reuse the `notifications` `kind='reward'` inbox; clear-rate → golden-ticket tier in the nightly cron behind the prod publish gate; first-clear-only + daily cap anti-farm; high-value rewards gated on replay verification.
6. **ReplayTrace verification location (P2-C).** In-Worker engine replay is too heavy for the free tier; choose (a) config-match for stats + maintainer/offline replay for high-value rewards, or (b) a dedicated verification worker. The single-player recording tap must be enabled first (currently OFF by design).
7. **Allowed-species persistence.** Confirm extending `ChallengeData` with `allowedSpecies?: number[]` (the `startingRoots?` precedent, `challenge-data.ts:8`) vs. keeping the list out-of-band in the config and verifying only server-side. Affects save-format compatibility.
8. **Anti-cheat strength for P1 clears.** Is IV-clamp + config-match + `isErGhostTeamLegal` bans sufficient for P1 (no rewards), with replay gating added only when rewards land in P2? (Recommended.)
9. **Avatar source.** `colosseumHeadSprite` trainer-class atlas portraits for creator / first-clear / recent / player crest (no new art), or a future per-user avatar asset? Player "RIVAL / Rank 42" crest is a cosmetic stub until a profile backend exists.
10. **New er-assets art to commission (all OPTIONAL — zero strictly required).** In priority order: (1) one tileable distressed grain/torn-edge PNG (biggest fidelity lift); (2) a brush-stroke display font (the only path to a literal painted title — otherwise approximated with `pkmnems`/emerald at large GOLD fill); (3) a radial-glow PNG for true additive bloom; (4) a hex avatar frame; (5) an `er_icon__ui_*` sidebar glyph set.
11. **How close to the concept art do we commit?** The honest gaps are (a) painterly card art → only approximable as framed black-silhouette-on-tincture composites with a focus→colour reveal, never truly painted; (b) brush-stroke title → needs a new font; (c) true grit/glow → needs the optional PNGs. Everything else (donut, emblems, chips, avatars, icon grid, empty states, dark/gold chrome) is FAITHFUL today. Confirm the silhouette canon is the accepted direction before building the compositor, since it defines the whole visual identity.
